scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.render:build:api: npm install && npm run prisma:generate --workspace=apps/api && npm run prisma:migrate --workspace=apps/api
